rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft British Museum The Faith Press Ltd. 7, Tufton Street, Westminster, S. W. 1, Akademie der Wissenschaften in Hamburg

Letter of Stephen Gaselee to Canon Woolley. 27 January 1931.

Letter from Stephen Gaselee to Stephen G. Wright, 26 November 1931
Letter from Stephen Gaselee to Steven G. Wright, 2 December 1931
Letter from Stephen Gaselee to Steven G. Wright, 22 January 1932
Letter from Stephen Gaselee to Canon Douglas, 23 January 1936
Letter of the Ethiopian Minister W. Martin to Canon Douglas, 13 March 1936
A copy of the Amharic text from Part A, p. 1
Translation of the Amharic text from Part A, p. 1
Letter from Sirak Herui to Stephen Wright
Letter from Canon Douglas to the British Museum
